name: Night of the Witch's Invasion
short_description: Defeat the evil witches, rescue the trapped bunnies, and defend the peace of the town!
detailed_description:
Game Type: Third-Person Action
Art Style: Anime, Snowy Night
Game Overview
This game blends rich combat experiences with lighthearted rescue missions. On a cold, snowy night, witches quietly invade Bunny Town, planning to capture all the bunnies. Your goal is simple: rescue the trapped bunnies to complete each level.

Game Features

  • Combine punches and kicks freely for smooth combat and exhilarating combos.

  • You can rescue bunnies while battling witches, or distract the enemies or defeat them head-on to achieve your goal. The choice is yours!

  • The warm, anime-inspired art style lets you feel the healing and joy amidst intense combat.

  • Defeat tough enemies or unleash dazzling combos to earn points. Taking damage will lower your score. Challenge yourself to beat your high score!
